zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah de Dunstanville於1137年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall38歲，母親Beatrice FitzWilliam22歲。她於1157年與Adhémar V Boson de Limoges在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1216年10月30日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年79歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安沙吉利-素-艾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah de Dunstanville于1137年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall38岁，母亲Beatrice FitzWilliam22岁。她于1157年与Adhémar V Boson de Limoges在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1216年10月30日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年79岁，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安沙吉利-素-艾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah de Dunstanville was born in 1137, in Cornwall, England, her father, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, was 38 and her mother, Beatrice FitzWilliam, was 22. She married Adhémar V Boson de Limoges in 1157, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 30 October 1216, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 79, and was buried in Saint-Yrieix-sous-Aixe, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah de Dunstanville est née en 1137, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Beatrice FitzWilliam, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Adhémar V Boson de Limoges en 1157, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 octobre 1216, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Yrieix-sous-Aixe, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah de Dunstanville 1137 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall 38 und ihre Mutter Beatrice FitzWilliam 22. Sie hat 1157 in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Adhémar V Boson de Limoges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Oktober 1216 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Yrieix-sous-Aixe, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah de Dunstanville è nata il nel 1137 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Beatrice FitzWilliam, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Adhémar V Boson de Limoges nel 1157, nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 ottobre 1216, nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Yrieix-sous-Aixe, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah de Dunstanvilleが1137年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwallは38歳，母Beatrice FitzWilliamは22歳であった。1157年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズでAdhémar V Boson de Limogesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1216年10月30日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで79歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンサイント-イリーイクス-ソウス-アイクスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah de Dunstanville(이)가 1137년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice FitzWilliam(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1157년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 Adhémar V Boson de Limoges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1216년 10월 30일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 세인트-이리이스-소우스-아이세에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah de Dunstanville nasceu em 1137, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice FitzWilliam, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Adhémar V Boson de Limoges em 1157, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1216, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Yrieix-sous-Aixe, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah de Dunstanville родилась в 1137 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice FitzWilliam, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adhémar V Boson de Limoges в 1157 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 октября 1216 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-ириикс-соус-еикс, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah de Dunstanville nació en 1137, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Beatrice FitzWilliam, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Adhémar V Boson de Limoges en 1157, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1216, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Yrieix-sous-Aixe, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
